name: Jesco Holdings, Inc.
summary: JESCO Holdings, Inc. engages in the design, construction, and maintenance of electrical equipment, and information and communication systems. The company operates through Domestic EPC, ASEAN EPC, Integrated media, and CRE businesses. The Domestic EPC business engages in the installation of electrical equipment and telecommunication systems. The ASEAN EPC business is involved in construction work, electrical equipment engineering, telecommunications engineering, and air-conditioning and sanitary equipment engineering activities. The Integrated Media Communication business sells and installs OEM-manufactured large display systems, such as LED displays, as well as owns and operates large displays installed along Metropolitan Expressways. The Corporate Real Estate (CRE) business leases office buildings. The company was formerly known as JESCO Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JESCO Holdings, Inc. in September 2004. JESCO Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
